text: Here, I transition from the buzz of a communal learning space to the vibrant, conceptual landscape of an exhibition about research and development. In the first, I feel slightly distanced yet curious, observing focused minds through glass, separated by both a literal and intellectual barrier. Now, in this R+D space, color and words envelop me, inviting contemplation about humanity’s role in innovation. I feel energized and drawn into a dialogue between creation and understanding. Being here, I sense both the collective striving for knowledge and an undercurrent of creative excitement—an environment ripe with potential and thoughtful inquiry.
